name: Christmas Angel Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream the shortening and cream cheese until smooth and fluffy.
2. Add the light brown sugar, granulated sugar, eggs, and vanilla; mix well.
3. In a separate bowl, sift together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the egg and sugar mixture, stirring until combined.
5. Mix in the candied fruit and nuts.
6. Drop rounded spoonfuls of the dough onto a lightly oiled cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 350°F for 10-12 minutes, or until the edges are just browned.
Yield: 3 dozen
